title: Interest rates
summary: This is a navigation/index page for the Bank of Canada's interest rate data portal. The page lists available data products including Treasury bill yields, bond yields, CORRA (Canadian Overnight Repo Rate Average), yield curves, money market yields, U.S. interest rate lookups, and a policy interest rate comparison tool. No specific rate values, policy decisions, or substantive content are provided in this source.
key_points: This is a data portal page listing available Bank of Canada interest rate data products, not a policy announcement or data release.
Available data includes Treasury bill yields, Government of Canada bond yields, CORRA, zero-coupon yield curves, and money market yields.
Data is available for download in XML, JSON, and CSV formats.
The page notes that monetary policy is conducted by adjusting the target for the overnight rate on eight fixed dates each year.
A side-by-side lookup tool is available for comparing changes to the Bank Rate and overnight rate target over time.
U.S. interest rate lookups include the U.S. Prime Rate, Federal Funds Rate, and Commercial Paper rates.
why_it_matters: This page serves as an access point to Bank of Canada interest rate data but provides no substantive policy or market information itself. It has no direct relevance for research or market analysis beyond serving as a navigation hub.
